{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Northstrider's hands
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Northstrider's hands]] are gloved in pitch-black scales.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
